title: Robata Glazed American Pork Chops with Mushrooms
description: Tender and flavorful pork chops glazed with a sweet and spicy robata sauce, served with sautéed mushrooms.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
Grill pork chops for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they reach 145°F.
While pork chops are grilling, melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add mushrooms and sauté until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Brush robata glaze on pork chops during the last minute of grilling.
Serve pork chops with sautéed mushrooms and a drizzle of mustardy glaze.
